# MIRAC Technologies - Master Knowledge Base

## Hair Transplant Clinic Software
- **Exact problems solved**: WhatsApp chaos, lost leads, multilingual communication, before/after photos organization.
- **Exact features built**: Patient CRM, WhatsApp automation, multilingual support, photo management, international payments.
- **Price ranges**: $8,000 - $25,000
- **Markets served**: Turkey (Istanbul), Thailand, Poland
- **Target buyer**: Hair transplant clinic owner
- **Keywords**: hair transplant clinic software, hair transplant CRM Turkey, medical tourism software Istanbul
- **Page URL**: https://www.miractechnologies.com/hair-transplant-clinic-software

## Luxury Hotels & Resorts Software
- **Exact problems solved**: Manual guest requests via WhatsApp, housekeeping delays, missed upselling.
- **Exact features built**: AI concierge, housekeeping automation, upselling module, unified booking calendar.
- **Price ranges**: $15,000 - $60,000
- **Markets served**: Maldives, Bali, UAE, Thailand
- **Target buyer**: General Manager or Owner
- **Keywords**: hotel AI concierge software, resort management system Maldives, luxury hotel automation
- **Page URL**: https://www.miractechnologies.com/hotel-ai-concierge-software

## Real Estate CRM Dubai
- **Exact problems solved**: Scattered leads, slow follow-ups, manual payment tracking, messy commission calculations.
- **Exact features built**: Property Finder/Bayut integrations, lead automation, payment plans, NOC tracking.
- **Price ranges**: $12,000 - $50,000
- **Markets served**: Dubai, Abu Dhabi, Riyadh, Istanbul
- **Target buyer**: Real estate agency owner or ops director
- **Keywords**: real estate CRM Dubai, property management software UAE, Property Finder CRM integration
- **Page URL**: https://www.miractechnologies.com/real-estate-crm-dubai

## Construction ERP Saudi Arabia
- **Exact problems solved**: Excel tracking errors, subcontractor mismanagement, lack of Vision 2030 compliance.
- **Exact features built**: Milestone tracking, subcontractor management, ZATCA-compliant invoicing.
- **Price ranges**: $25,000 - $150,000
- **Markets served**: Saudi Arabia, UAE, Kuwait
- **Target buyer**: Construction company owner/ops director
- **Keywords**: construction ERP Saudi Arabia, Vision 2030 construction software
- **Page URL**: https://www.miractechnologies.com/construction-erp-saudi-arabia

## Logistics Software Germany
- **Exact problems solved**: Manual dispatching, lack of fleet visibility, missing PODs.
- **Exact features built**: Fleet tracking, WMS, digital POD, route optimization.
- **Price ranges**: €18,000 - €75,000
- **Markets served**: Germany, Canada, UAE, UK
- **Target buyer**: Logistics company owner
- **Keywords**: logistics software Germany, fleet management software Germany
- **Page URL**: https://www.miractechnologies.com/logistics-software-germany

## Recruitment Agency Software
- **Exact problems solved**: Manual CV screening, fragmented client communications.
- **Exact features built**: AI CV screening, candidate CRM, WhatsApp automation, client portal.
- **Price ranges**: $10,000 - $40,000
- **Markets served**: UK, Canada, Australia, UAE
- **Target buyer**: Recruitment agency owner
- **Keywords**: recruitment agency software UK, AI CV screening software
- **Page URL**: https://www.miractechnologies.com/recruitment-agency-software

## Manufacturing ERP Germany
- **Exact problems solved**: Inefficient production planning, paper-based QC.
- **Exact features built**: Industry 4.0 integrations, production planning, digital QC.
- **Price ranges**: €28,000 - €120,000
- **Markets served**: Germany, Poland, Netherlands
- **Target buyer**: Manufacturing SME owner
- **Keywords**: manufacturing ERP Germany, Fertigungs ERP Mittelstand
- **Page URL**: https://www.miractechnologies.com/manufacturing-erp-germany

## Small Business Automation Software
- **Exact problems solved**: Missed phone calls, appointment no-shows.
- **Exact features built**: Online booking, WhatsApp reminders, customer loyalty.
- **Price ranges**: $1,500 - $8,000
- **Markets served**: US, UK, Australia, Canada
- **Target buyer**: Salon/clinic/gym owner
- **Keywords**: booking software for salons, WhatsApp automation small business
- **Page URL**: https://www.miractechnologies.com/small-business-automation-software

## Fintech Software Singapore
- **Exact problems solved**: MAS compliance reporting, cross-currency reconciliations.
- **Exact features built**: MAS compliant modules, multi-currency dashboards, real-time monitoring.
- **Price ranges**: $30,000+
- **Markets served**: Singapore
- **Target buyer**: Fintech founder or CFO
- **Keywords**: fintech software Singapore, financial compliance software Singapore
- **Page URL**: https://www.miractechnologies.com/fintech-software-singapore

## Bottling Plant ERP
- **Exact problems solved**: Poor batch traceability, inefficient line management.
- **Exact features built**: Production line management, QC, batch tracking, export compliance.
- **Price ranges**: $40,000+
- **Markets served**: Maldives, France, Germany
- **Target buyer**: Bottling factory owner
- **Keywords**: bottling plant software, beverage manufacturing ERP
- **Page URL**: https://www.miractechnologies.com/bottling-plant-erp
